backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Natural Hunt app that manages user profiles and plant identification rewards, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins. Exposes query/update methods for profile CRUD, points tracking, and adding plant identifications (awarding 10 points each).
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the actor state by transforming the old UserProfile (name only) to the new schema that includes an identifier field, defaulting to `#gmail "unknown"` for existing users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their relevant source files, component dependencies, and test IDs, covering sign-up/login, draggable mascot, plant identification animation, and anime mascot illustration features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of every component, hook, and asset in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors, radii, and chart/sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Natural Hunt React app, setting the page title and mounting the React root via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates the app behind actor initialization and user profile checks, showing a loading spinner, SignUpScreen for new users, or the main welcome/camera/discoveries navigation flow for returning users.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavBar.tsx: Fixed glass-morphism bottom navigation bar with Scan and Discoveries tabs, an animated active indicator, and a floating points badge that reads live data from the backend.
frontend/src/components/CameraView.tsx: Main camera interface component that captures photos, triggers plant identification, and manages scan states (idle, scanning, result, not-plant, not-real) while displaying appropriate overlays and saving results to the backend.
Displays the user's plant discovery collection with animated stat cards (total scans, unique species, points) and a scrollable list of identified plants with dates and details from the plant database.
A draggable anime mascot image component that supports free drag via mouse/touch events or an animated 'standBeside' mode that positions it next to a given board position.
Overlay shown when a scanned image is not a plant, displaying the detected category with an emoji, a tip, and a 'Try Again' button over a blurred version of the captured image.
frontend/src/components/NotRealOverlay.t: Overlay shown when the captured image is not a real photo (e.g., screenshot or drawing), displaying a warning with the rejection reason and instructions to use a real camera photo.
frontend/src/components/PlantInfoBoard.t: Displays an animated plant info board overlay with a typewriter text effect and speech synthesis that reads plant benefits aloud, then auto-dismisses after speech ends.
frontend/src/components/PlantResultPanel: Renders a slide-up result panel after plant identification, showing the captured image, plant details, confetti animation, points badge, a draggable mascot, and the PlantInfoBoard overlay.
frontend/src/components/PointsCounter.ts: Displays the user's current points fetched via React Query, with a pop animation triggered whenever points increase.
frontend/src/components/SignUpScreen.tsx: Renders a sign-up form that collects a user's name and either a Gmail or phone number, validates input, and saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: Shows the app's landing screen with branding, feature highlights, and a button that requests camera permission before proceeding to the main experience.
frontend/src/data/plantDatabase.ts: Defines the PlantData interface and exports a static array of plant records including names, scientific names, benefits, ecological info, and fun facts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlantIdentificatio: Implements client-side plant identification by analyzing image pixel data (color ratios, uniformity, edge sharpness) and matching results against a plant database to return classification results.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user points, plant discoveries, and user profiles via a backend actor, with localStorage fallback for anonymous users.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: A React hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide text-to-speech functionality with preferred voice selection, speaking state tracking, and stop control.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a deep-forest-green design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, Tailwind base layers, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/identification.ts: Defines TypeScript discriminated union types for plant classification results: real plant, non-plant object, or non-real/artificial image.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Nunito, Playfair Display), CSS-variable-based color tokens (forest, gold, cream, shadcn-style semantic colors), border radii, box shadows, and custom keyframe animations (shimmer, fade-in-up, bounce-in, float, glow-pulse, scan-line).
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a plant detection app with AI identification, Gmail/phone sign-up, a draggable anime mascot on the camera screen, and an animated sequence where the mascot writes and speaks plant beneficial uses; tracks existing and new features with requirement IDs and image asset specifications.
